title: Akiflow Akiflow For Developers
text: #### Akiflow streamlines task and time management for developers, ensuring you can focus on what you do best — coding. Integrate GitHub issues with Akiflow, ensuring your coding tasks are managed efficiently Integrate Linear issues with Akiflow, keeping your engineering tasks organized and on track. title: Integrations
text: Integrations Click your avatar on the top right of your Akiflow and click Integrations. Pick your favorite app and click ' Connect ' to establish the connection. You can also type the app’s name in the search bar to quickly find it. Easy as that!

title: Akiflow Our Product Development Process - Akiflow
text: December 13, 2021 - Another question we ask in the survey is, “How can we improve Akiflow for you?” · We track the requests from the answer to this question and engage with the users via chat to expand and give more context. Now that we gathered the data, we start a prioritization process. We compute an internal feature prioritization score for every idea obtained from quantitative and qualitative data. We integrated via API with Canny to push the value (MRR) of the users so we know which features are requested by paying customers.
